drift_catches: F-104: SI 2023/817 title — Stage 1 seed cited 'International Tax Compliance (Amendment) Regulations 2023'; correct verbatim title is 'The Platform Operators (Due Diligence and Reporting Requirements) Regulations 2023'. Affects C4 + C5 (same anchor).

F-105: LURA 2023 section drift — Stage 1 seed cited s.81 (which is 'Alteration of street names') as second-home council-tax-premium anchor; correct anchor is s.80 'Dwellings occupied periodically: England'. LURA 2023 s.79 amends LGFA 1992 s.11B (empty dwellings), NOT s.11C as the seed implied. Affects C4 + C5.

SI 2022/1265 discovery (no F-flag): seed cited as 'Non-Domestic Rating (Definition of Domestic Property) (England) Order 2022' for 140/70-day FHL business-rates test; the cited SI number resolves to 'The Electricity (Connection Charges) (Amendment) Regulations 2022'. Correct SI deferred to RUN-time verification per Bug #3 discipline. Affects C4 + C5.

Pick 2 PIM4400 → PIM3210 correction: seed competitor-list cited 'HMRC PIM4400 (replacement of domestic items)' but PIM4400 is 'Property allowance: contents'. Correct anchor for replacement-of-domestic-items is PIM3210 'Furnished lettings: Replacement of domestic items relief: 2016-17 onwards'. Corrected in-place; no F-flag (manual-numbering mistake, not statutory drift).
